title: Explore parallel loading for multi-project indexing benchmarks
description: Evaluate parallelizing issue loading/indexing during benchmarks to measure speedups. Implement parallel variants where appropriate for Python and/or Rust benchmarking runs.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added parallel loading results to Python and Rust discovery benchmarks, updated tools/check_benchmarks.py and tools/perf_baseline.json for serial/parallel thresholds, and documented parallel mode in planning/BENCHMARK_RECURSIVE_DISCOVERY.md. Ran: python tools/benchmark_discovery.py; cargo run --manifest-path rust/Cargo.toml --bin discovery_benchmark -- --root tools/tmp/benchmark-discovery-fixtures; python tools/check_benchmarks.py.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Benchmarks can run with and without parallel loading, and results are reported side by side.
